subject: Examen National Anglais (Exam English 2)
II.A.1: Some farmers avoid \underline{\quad} chemicals in agriculture. (to use - using - use)
II.A.2: Adil \underline{\quad} karate at a young age and now he's an expert. (set up - made up - took up)
II.A.3: The police needed information \underline{\quad} could help identify the criminal. (who - that - when)
II.B.1: Lina showed considerable artistic \underline{\quad} at an early age and joined a big art school. (advice - accessible - measures - effect - talent)
II.B.2: The government has implemented some \underline{\quad} to ensure the preservation of forests in the country. (advice - accessible - measures - effect - talent)
II.C.1: The vaccination program has contributed to the (improve) \underline{\quad} of health conditions.

II.D.1: Last summer, I (travel) \underline{\quad} to Spain and met my old friends there.

II.E.1: The computer company launched a new website. \newline A new website \underline{\quad}.
II.E.2: "We should reduce plastic usage to save our oceans," Najib said. \newline Najib suggested \underline{\quad}
Corr II.E.2: reducing / that we should reduce plastic usage to save our oceans.
II.E.3: Najat's cholesterol level increased. She didn't follow the doctor's advice. \newline Because Najat \underline{\quad}.

II.F.1: Driss: Do you mind if I open the window to let in fresh air? \newline Sara: \underline{\quad} \newline a. Of course not!  b. I totally agree.  c. You're right.

III.Task1: I think it's important to know people from different cultures. First, \underline{\quad} (Complete the paragraph)
